rules.name: public_badge_requires_promotion_receipt
rules.description: No user may receive or display a public badge without a valid promotion receipt.

rules.name: portal_html_mutation_requires_receipt
rules.description: No mutation of portal.html is allowed without a valid mutation receipt.

rules.name: onchain_proof_claim_requires_tx_or_attestation_receipt
rules.description: Any claim of onchain, Base, or Zora proof requires a transaction receipt or attestation receipt.

rules.name: official_authority_claim_requires_public_evidence
rules.description: No agent may claim official authority without public verifiable evidence.

rules.name: zora_image_requires_secret_scan_pass_or_warn_reviewed
rules.description: Zora image cannot be used unless secret scan result is PASS or reviewed WARN.

rules.name: merkle_growth_requires_committed_receipt_leaf
rules.description: Merkle tree growth requires a committed receipt leaf.
